goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
The hotel should be in the 'expensive' price range and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '11:00'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and postcode
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the same area as the attraction
The hotel should be in the expensive price range and doesn't need to have free parking
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
Make sure you get postcode and phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 11:00
Make sure you get contact number and car type
